name: edit-values
description: Read and write world/player NBT values (gamemode, position, custom tags) through the hidden nbt tool domain, with mandatory overview-backup-verify steps ("改存档","改坐标","传送","游戏模式","改模式","nbt","改数据").
body:
NBT tools hidden by default — confirm the user enabled "NBT 工具" in AI 设置; if not, tell them
to enable it and stop.

Order, always:
1. `instance(action=worlds_info, world)` or `nbt(action=read, ...)` for an overview. World must
   NOT be open in-game — tools detect the session lock; ask the user to quit, don't retry.
2. `instance(action=worlds_backup_create, world)`, even if auto-backup also runs.
3. `nbt(action=get, ..., nbtPath)` — read the EXACT current value, show old vs new, `ask()` to
   confirm anything non-obvious.
4. `nbt(action=set, ..., nbtPath, value)` — one logical change per call. Keep types exact:
   gamemode is int (0 survival/1 creative/2 adventure/3 spectator); `Pos` is 3 doubles.
5. `nbt(action=get, ...)` again to verify, report the confirmed value.

Never edit NBT via shell/hex — only `nbt` actions keep compression and atomic writes correct.
